headline: M&T Bank Gains Nearly 13% in 6 Months: How to Play the Stock Now?
summary: MTB stock rises 12.8% in six months, can strong growth, buybacks and AI initiatives keep the rally going, or is it time to wait for a better entry?

headline: Fifth Third Named to Forbes List of World’s Best Banks 2026 Ranking
summary: CINCINNATI, April 08, 2026--Fifth Third (Nasdaq: FITB) has been named to Forbes’ list of the World’s Best Banks 2026, marking the fourth year the Bank has earned the recognition.
